findings.description: Protocol schema mismatches (status/verdict, currentWorkUnit/currentWork) cause silent false eval failures
findings.proposedRule: P40: grep all protocols for old field names after any rename

findings.description: LLM output parsing must handle fences, preamble, and braces-in-strings
findings.proposedRule: P41: multi-strategy extraction for LLM JSON output

findings.description: Debug fixture BUG comment revealed root cause, undermining eval discriminative power
findings.proposedRule: P42: fixtures present symptoms, never diagnoses

findings.description: file_contains regex on free-text evidence scored 0.0; model_grade scored 1.0 on same content
findings.proposedRule: P43: model_grade for prose evidence, file_contains for structural assertions

findings.description: Without calibration run, would have spent effort fixing working gates instead of broken grader
